title: The physics behind Flow Matching models
summary: Julia Turc provides an in-depth analysis of Flow Matching, a training algorithm for generative models based on continuous normalizing flows and optimal transport. The video covers theoretical foundations including time-variant probability densities, continuity equations, velocity fields, and the flow matching loss, with connections to Rectified Flow and Stochastic Interpolants methods.
